papers_mined.title: Chilotan architecture (Wikipedia)
papers_mined.note: Palafito stilt houses on wooden piles (luma/cypress wood); rise/fall with tides up to 10m; multi-front (street + sea/dock); interconnected via wooden bridges.

papers_mined.title: Chiloé Palafito History Boutique Hotel
papers_mined.note: Tiered structure — water-line pier, ground-level dwelling, attic storage; flexible piles accommodate tidal flux; multi-purpose tiered use (live/store/work).

papers_mined.title: Palafitos Architecture Chiloe Castro
papers_mined.note: Multi-level dwellings on stilts; vernacular engineering for tidal/flooding adaptation; communal piers.

papers_mined.title: Architecture of Palafitos Castro Chiloé
papers_mined.note: Native woods + larch tiles; multi-functional tiered space; cultural fusion Kawésqar + Jesuit.

papers_mined.title: Tutti SSD-Backed KV Cache Long-Context LLM (2605.03375)
